summary: On April 19, 2026, a kamikaze drone attack by Ukrainian forces targeted the port area in Feodosia, Crimea. The 66th Separate Mechanized Brigade successfully evacuated a wounded soldier using the TerMIT unmanned ground system, while the 2nd Battalion of the 35th Marine Brigade conducted operations to destroy Russian UAVs. In the Kharkiv region, National Guard specialists used night FPV drones to destroy a Russian self-propelled artillery system "Bogdan," and the Birds of Magyar unit destroyed a Russian TOS-1A MLRS with a combination of Bulava loitering munitions and FPV drones. The Rubicon Center reported destroying 129 targets on April 18, 2026, including Ukrainian personnel and fixed-wing UAVs, and captured a Ukrainian "Shark-M" UAV in the Krasny Liman area after a kinetic intercept by the "Yolka" air defense drone.
